about.title: A Passionate Gamer
about.p1: Sir Gary has been dedicated to videogames for over a decade, whether studying them, creating educational videos and theories, or developing mods that push the boundaries of gameplay.
about.p2: If you enjoy videogames and challenges, you've come to the right place.
faq.title: Inquiries
faq.q1: Q: What do I do if I encounter a bug?
faq.a1: A: If you encounter a bug, please contact me via Twitter, email, or Discord.
faq.a2: A: Yes, send me a message and I will consider the idea and its complexity.
support.title: Assistance
support.p1: For severe structural failures, please reach out with detailed logs of the incident.
terms.title: Conditions of Use
terms.p1: I am not responsible for any issues or misuse of these mods. Patches should be applied over a backup or the games themselves legally and legitimately acquired.
